items.situation: An aircraft declares an emergency and must be assigned the emergency beacon code. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: SQUAWK MAYDAY ON SEVEN SEVEN ZERO ZERO

items.situation: You are making a point out on an aircraft southwest of Richmond VOR. The aircraft is Southwest 452 at 5,000 feet. Build the point-out transmission.
items.target_phrase: POINT OUT SOUTHWEST OF RICHMOND V O R SOUTHWEST FOUR FIFTY-TWO FIVE THOUSAND

items.situation: A pilot has opposite-direction traffic in sight and you need a report once the traffic is passed. Build the instruction.
A weather deviation is approved right of course. The aircraft should maintain 14,000 feet and expect to resume the STAR at Glaxi. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: DEVIATION RIGHT OF COURSE APPROVED MAINTAIN ONE FOUR THOUSAND EXPECT TO RESUME STAR AT GLAXI

items.situation: An aircraft should descend and maintain 6,000 feet, then reduce speed to 230 knots. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: DESCEND AND MAINTAIN SIX THOUSAND THEN REDUCE SPEED TO TWO THREE ZERO KNOTS

items.situation: An RNAV departure goes to MPASS from Runway 26 Left, and the aircraft is being cleared for takeoff. Build the clearance.
items.target_phrase: R N A V TO MPASS RUNWAY TWO SIX LEFT CLEARED FOR TAKEOFF

items.situation: You need to advise an aircraft that vectors will cross the final approach course for spacing. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: EXPECT VECTORS ACROSS FINAL FOR SPACING

items.situation: An aircraft is four miles from LIMA, should turn right heading 340, maintain 2,000 until established on the localizer, and is then cleared for the ILS Runway 36 approach. Build the transmission.
items.target_phrase: FOUR MILES FROM LIMA TURN RIGHT HEADING THREE FOUR ZERO MAINTAIN TWO THOUSAND UNTIL ESTABLISHED ON THE LOCALIZER CLEARED I L S RUNWAY THREE SIX APPROACH

items.situation: An aircraft is too high for a safe approach. If the runway lights are not in sight, it must execute the missed approach. Build the instruction.
items.target_phrase: TOO HIGH FOR SAFE APPROACH IF RUNWAY LIGHTS NOT IN SIGHT EXECUTE MISSED APPROACH

items.situation: A surveillance-approach aircraft is slightly right of course on heading 030. Build the guidance transmission.
items.target_phrase: HEADING ZERO THREE ZERO SLIGHTLY RIGHT OF COURSE

items.situation: A PAR aircraft is on glidepath but slightly left of course on heading 030. Build the guidance transmission.
items.target_phrase: HEADING ZERO THREE ZERO ON GLIDEPATH SLIGHTLY LEFT OF COURSE

items.situation: The glideslope information is unavailable. If runway lights are not in sight, the aircraft must execute the missed approach. Build the advisory.
items.target_phrase: NO GLIDEPATH INFORMATION AVAILABLE IF RUNWAY LIGHTS NOT IN SIGHT EXECUTE MISSED APPROACH
